---
title: "getMPIC_Sci.py"
toc: false
page-layout: full
number-sections: false
---

[← Back to workflow](../../mh1-processor.html)

Science quality MODIS-Aqua particulate inorganic carbon (PIC) retrieval.

::: {.code-shell}

```{.python}
{{< include ../../workflows/mh1-mpoc-mpic-processor/scripts/MPIC/getMPIC_Sci.py >}}
```

:::
